635 A1400J_SELF_PAY_PYR_SW A1400J_SELF_PAY_PYR_SW A1400J - Payer: Self-pay CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is self-pay. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
636 A1400K_NO_PYR_SW A1400K_NO_PYR_SW A1400K - Payer: No payer source CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident has no payer source. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
